happyPath._description: Complete checkout flow with 2 items (Backpack + Bike Light)

expectedConfirmation.heading: Thank you for your order!
expectedConfirmation.subtext: Your order has been dispatched, and will arrive just as fast as the pony can get there!

negativeAllEmpty._description: Submit checkout form with all fields empty

negativeFirstNameEmpty._description: Submit checkout form with First Name empty

negativeLastNameEmpty._description: Submit checkout form with Last Name empty

negativeZipEmpty._description: Submit checkout form with Postal Code empty

negativeSpecialChars._description: Checkout with special characters in name fields — exploratory probe
negativeSpecialChars._note: SauceDemo accepts all characters in name fields without validation. This is a known gap. Verify no XSS executes.
negativeSpecialChars.expectedBehaviour: Form should submit without executing scripts; text should be rendered as escaped plain text in overview

negativeLongStrings._description: Checkout with very long strings in all fields
negativeLongStrings.expectedBehaviour: App should either accept and display truncated text, or show a validation error. Must not crash.

edgeSingleChar._description: Checkout with single character in each field
edgeSingleChar.expectedBehaviour: Order should complete successfully — no minimum length restrictions documented in requirements

edgeNumericNames._description: Checkout with numeric values in name fields
edgeNumericNames.expectedBehaviour: App should accept numeric values in name fields (no alphabetic validation in requirements) and complete order

edgeSingleProduct._description: Checkout with a single product only (Backpack)

edgeCartBadge._description: Add 2 items and verify cart badge shows correct count

navCancelStepOne._description: Click Cancel on Checkout Step One — should return to cart
navCancelStepOne.expectedCartState: Items should still be in cart after cancel

navCancelStepTwo._description: Click Cancel on Checkout Step Two — should return to inventory

navContinueShopping._description: Click Continue Shopping from cart page — should return to inventory
navContinueShopping.expectedBehaviour: Cart items should persist after returning to inventory

navBackHome._description: Click Back Home from order confirmation — should return to inventory with empty cart
navBackHome.expectedBehaviour: Cart should be empty after completed order and clicking Back Home

uiCartPage._description: UI element visibility checks on the Cart page
expectedElements: Product name for each item in cart
Product price for each item in cart
Cart badge in header showing correct count

uiCheckoutStepOne._description: UI element visibility checks on Checkout Step One

uiCheckoutStepTwo._description: UI element visibility checks on Checkout Step Two (Overview)
expectedElements: Price Total section with item total, tax, and total

uiConfirmation._description: UI element visibility checks on Checkout Complete page
expectedElements: Thank you for your order! h2 heading
